Uses of Package
com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder

  • Packages that use com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder 
    Package Description
    com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder
    Provides classes for building resource instances.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.impl
    Provides implementations for Gemini API resource interfaces.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.spec
    Provides specifications and interfaces for Gemini API resources.
  • Classes in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder used by com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder 
    Class Description
    BatchEmbedContentsRequestBuilder
    Builder for creating BatchEmbedContentsRequest instances.
    BlobBuilder
    Builder for creating Blob instances.
    ContentBuilder
    Builder for creating Content instances.
    EmbedContentRequestBuilder
    Builder for creating EmbedContentRequest instances.
    FileDataBuilder
    Builder for creating FileData instances.
    FunctionCallBuilder
    Builder for creating FunctionCall instances.
    FunctionCallingConfigBuilder
    Builder for creating FunctionCallingConfig instances.
    FunctionDeclarationBuilder
    Builder for creating FunctionDeclaration instances.
    FunctionResponseBuilder
    Builder for creating FunctionResponse instances.
    GenerateContentRequestBuilder
    Builder for creating GenerateContentRequest instances in a fluent and intuitive way.
    GenerateTextRequestBuilder
    Builder for creating GenerateContentRequest instances specifically for generating text in a fluent and intuitive way.
    GenerationConfigBuilder
    Builder for creating GenerationConfig instances.
    GenerationResourceBuilder
    Builder class for constructing GenerateContentRequest objects.
    GenerationResourceBuilder.GenerationResourceBuilderBuilder  
    HarmBlockThresholdBuilder
    Builder for creating HarmBlockThreshold instances.
    HarmCategoryBuilder
    Builder for creating HarmCategory instances.
    ModeBuilder
    Builder for creating Mode instances.
    PartBuilder
    Builder for creating Part instances.
    ResourceBuilder
    Builder for creating resource instances for interacting with the Gemini API.
    SafetySettingBuilder
    Builder class for constructing SafetySetting objects.
    SchemaBuilder
    Builder for constructing Schema objects.
    ToolBuilder
    Builder for creating Tool instances.
    ToolConfigBuilder
    Builder for creating ToolConfig instances.
    TypeBuilder
    Builder for creating Type instances.
